andrea-weiss-61a3a645.bio:
Com 24 anos de atuação no mercado publicitário, pós-graduada em Investimentos e Finanças, desenvolvi minha carreira como mídia em grandes agências, em posições de diretoria na Fischer e DM9, e como Head de Mídia na Heads e W3haus. Na minha trajetória, agilidade, determinação e foco são características de destaque. Fui reconhecida por trazer inovação, modernidade e resultados comprovados para planejamentos de campanhas.

diego-antonio-santos-37208471.bio:
Com uma trajetória profissional solidificada em gestão de pessoas e finanças, destaco-me no desenvolvimento e implementação de estratégias administrativas. No Grupo Inteli, a minha atuação como Gerente nos últimos 7 meses permitiu-me aprimorar habilidades analíticas e reforçar minha competência em liderar equipes para a excelência operacional.

Como sócio proprietário da ES Outdoor por mais de um ano e meio, tenho demonstrado uma gestão eficaz e inovadora, com foco em resultados financeiros positivos e na otimização de processos. Minha experiência anterior na Rodalog também reflete minha habilidade em reverter cenários financeiros e gerir passivos trabalhistas, garantindo eficiência e conformidade legal.

alexander-stotz.bio: Digitale Medien und Infrastrukturen ermöglichen ganz neue Formen der Kommunikation. Für uns als Mensch – in unserem gewohnten Lebensumfeld. Mit der Digitalisierung der Außenwerbung entstehen Stadtscreens, die eine ganz neue, vernetzte Kommunikations-Infrastruktur im öffentlichen Raum ermöglichen. Das schafft Mehrwerte. Es pusht lokale Wirtschaftsunternehmen, nachhaltige Entwicklungen von NGO´s oder Initiativen. Es öffnet Kunst- oder Kulturräume und ermöglicht neue Dialogformen für uns als Bürger:innen. Der Stadtscreen ist ein Medium, das es gerade in Zeiten des Wandels, verschiedensten Akteur:innen ermöglicht, eben diesen selbst in Echtzeit zu gestalten. sebastianobregon.bio: In 2005 as I was studying Business in Eafit, in my home town Medellin, I quickly realized that I wanted to take the entrepreneurial path and that what I wanted was to start a company. As soon as I finished the University I went to live in Shanghai for 7 months where I studied basic practical spoken Chinese and searched for business opportunities that I could take back to my country. In February of 2006 I came back to Colombia and co founded Enmedio Comunicacion Digital, the first Digital Signage company in our country. fabiencouasnon.headline: VP Strategic Partnerships & Supply
fabiencouasnon.bio: Taboola helps people find relevant content online, matching them with news stories, articles, blogs, videos, apps, products and other content they’re likely to want to explore. How do we know what they’ll like? Using machine-learning algorithms, our technology analyzes hundreds of signals to capture exactly what kind of content is most likely to engage each individual. We do that more than 450 billion times a month for more than one billion unique users. Since we opened our doors in 2006, we have grown to become the leading discovery platform on the open web, serving a combination of the world’s best brands and the most respected global publishers. guillermo-de-lella.headline: CEO of ALOOH | Specialist in Out-of-Home Advertising (OOH) in Latin America | Industry Development, Regional Integration, and New Formats
guillermo-de-lella.bio: Mi recorrido profesional siempre estuvo ligado a la comunicación en el espacio público y al desarrollo de la industria OOH en América Latina. Con los años aprendí que el OOH no es solo un medio: es una expresión de nuestras ciudades, de sus ritmos, de su gente y de las marcas que buscan conectar con ella. Hoy tengo el honor de acompañar a la industria como CEO de ALOOH, trabajando junto a un ecosistema diverso de empresas, cámaras y profesionales que comparten la convicción de que el OOH tiene todavía mucho por crecer y aportar en la región. En estos últimos años, los cambios han sido profundos: la digitalización, el uso de datos, los nuevos formatos, la tecnología aplicada a superficies urbanas, y —cada vez más— la necesidad de pensar en prácticas sustentables que acompañen el crecimiento

➟ Directivo Senior con >20 años de experiencia liderando estrategia, P&L y operaciones multi-sede en Media & Entertainment. He dirigido unidades con ingresos ~100 M€ y EBITDA ≈25%, combinando crecimiento orgánico/inorgánico, excelencia operativa y gobierno financiero (CAPEX anual 15–20 M€, payback ≈24 meses en nuevas unidades). Mi foco: crecimiento rentable y expansión de EBITDA, con disciplina de capital, datos para decidir y una cultura de alto rendimiento sostenible.

• Estrategia → Ejecución: objetivos claros, “unit economics” y seguimiento con OKR/KPI.

Tim joined Haymarket in 1989 in London in media sales. In 2000 he moved to Singapore to launch CEI Asia Pacific for Haymarket. In 2001 he took up the role of Managing Director of Haymarket’s Asian businesses, including China, based in Hong Kong, with responsibility for Haymarket’s portfolio of publications, websites, conference and awards within the region. Tim was Co Chairman of Spikes Asia Festival, a joint venture between Haymarket and Ascential the organisers of Cannes Lions.

Tim joined Asian Integrated Media in April 2019 as Chief Executive and retains the role of Executive Director.

In October 2022, Tim took on the role of Strategy Lead, EMEA for DPAA, the Global Digital Out of Home Association.

mariaclotidespallarossa.bio:
Sono ceo di MediaKeys Italia, agenzia media internazionale con 17 filiali nel mondo, specializzata in progetti OOH/DOOH e strategie di comunicazione crossmediali su misura.

Lavoro da anni al fianco di brand, aziende e agenzie per trasformare l’attenzione in relazione e la visibilità in valore.

Credo in una comunicazione sobria, autentica, intelligente. Il mio approccio unisce concretezza strategica, ascolto attivo e un forte orientamento al risultato.

Internazionale per vocazione, italiana per cura e sensibilità, ogni progetto è per me un'occasione per creare connessioni significative.

mark-bracey.bio:
I can help you in two ways 👇

My experience in out of home (OOH) media spans more than 30 years.

Having witnessed the industry's digital transformation, I have pioneered new and emerging formats, technologies and delivery platforms.

I serve on various boards as an executive or advisor, including:

1) DoohClick AB.

↳ DoohClick is a state-of-the-art ad tech platform built from the ground up by OOH media owners for OOH owners.

It serves both classic and digital OOH formats.

DoohClick is a fully independent company, providing complete sales support, dynamic scheduling, programmatic improved analysis and fast reporting.

2) Portfolio Media Management.

jonas-glad-doohclick.bio:
DoohClick is a OOH management platform. Built from the ground up by OOH media owners for OOH owners and operators, it serves both classic and digital formats.

A fully independent company founded in Sweden, we’re focused on creating new business opportunities and updating legacy OOH systems globally.

What we do:

→ Programmatic improved analysis
→ Complete sales support
→ Dynamic scheduling
→ Fast reporting

Ready to be part of the next generation of OOH? Let’s chat.

His career kicked off in 1999 with BlowUp Media, but he quickly struck out on his own, founding E.K. Straas Ltd. in 2001, which he sold to Clear Channel UK. In 2004, he launched Ocean Outdoor, turning it into a leader in premium digital outdoor advertising before selling it to Smedvig Capital in 2008 and offloading his remaining stake in 2012 when Lloyds Development Capital took over. david-krupp-a720772.headline: Global CEO | Billups | Strategic Planning, Outdoor Advertising | Advisor
david-krupp-a720772.bio: I am no longer interested in the next promotion, the next award, the next speaking engagement, the next conference, the next, the next the next. Instead, I am trying to focus on the present and answer questions that hold my interest. * How do we deploy technology and training in a distributed environment to ensure we consistently build the most qualified and capable teams to achieve our clients’ objectives? * How can we deploy data and measurement globally so that the narrative about out-of-home recognizes it is both a performance and awareness media? * How can we create performance based models such that our clients pay for results and not just posting? * How can OOH ratings be reconfigured to accurately adjust based on real-time effects in market versus annualized or bi-annual updates? *

matteodemicheli.occupation: Head of Digital Media at AdKaora
matteodemicheli.bio:
Dopo alcune esperienze nel mondo del Social Media Marketing (Piani editoriali e ADV), manutenzione siti web (Wordpress) e eCommerce (Prestashop), dal 2017 mi occupo in AdKaora di strategie di pianificazione per campagne pubblicitarie volte al raggiungimento di obiettivi specifici.

Seguo il flusso dalla campagna pubblicitaria dalla definizione iniziale della strategia, fino alla reportistica finale passando per il settaggio sulle diverse piattaforme e l’ottimizzazione quotidiana. Lavoro con diverse piattaforme di tracciamento (AdForm, Sizmek, CM360) e alcune tra le principali DSP (AdForm, Google DV360). Mi interfaccio con IAS e MOAT per lavorare in ambito di Viewability, AdFraud, Brand Safety, così come con Nielsen per quello che riguarda l’On Target.

Gyvenime vadovaujuosi Mahatma Gandhi skelbtu principu - žmogus yra didis ne tiek dėl to, kad geba keisti pasaulį, kiek dėl to,kad geba keistis pats.
Esu rinkodaros ir pardavimų profesionalas, savo pasiekimais įrodęs gebėjimą planuoti ir įgyvendinti veiksmus, lemiančius įmonės rezultatus, burti efektyviai dirbančią komandą ir stiprinti pozicijas konkurencingose rinkose. Esu orientuotas į rezultatą, analitiškai mąstantis ir gebu greitai prisitaikyti prie besikeičiančios rinkos. pavelgalik.headline: Strategy | Communication | Impact
pavelgalik.occupation: Strategy & Digital Director at Omnicom Media
pavelgalik.bio:
In my career, I've seen under the hood of hundreds of brands across a thousand different campaigns. I've seen what helps a business win and why they sometimes fail.

With that experience, I can say with humble confidence: Growing a business is the easy part. The real challenge is making that growth sustainable.

In order to help solve this challenge, I combine deep expertise across following fields:

1. Consumer Insights & Strategy: Leveraging years of data on trends and buyer behavior

2. Marketing & Automation: Building systems that work efficiently,

3. Al & Prototyping: Constantly improving processes, coding and building functional apps

4. ESG: Ensuring growth is responsible and built to last.

Let's connect.

walter-ehren-outsitemedia.headline: CEO | Outsite Media | Urbane Riesenposter - großartig für Ihr Business, großartig für die Umwelt! | Nachhaltige Außenwerbung, Werbung, Nachhaltigkeit
walter-ehren-outsitemedia.bio:
Hi, mein Name ist Walter Ehren und ich bin CEO von der Outsite Media – einem Vorreiter in der Welt der nachhaltigen Außenwerbung.

Als Pioniere in der Außenwerbung setzen wir bei Outsite Media auf Größe mit Verantwortung. Unsere Riesenposter-Projekte erstrecken sich über ganz Deutschland und reichen von 50 bis über 1.000 Quadratmetern.

Was macht uns so einzigartig?

🌱 Nachhaltigkeit im Fokus: Wir verbinden beeindruckende Größe mit einem umweltfreundlichen Ansatz. Unsere Riesenposter werden mit Blick auf Nachhaltigkeit produziert, indem wir auf ressourcenschonende Materialien und umweltfreundliche Produktionsprozesse setzen.

💡 Botschaften im Rampenlicht: Warum sollten Sie Outsite Media für Ihre Riesenposter wählen? Weil wir nicht nur Flächen füllen, sondern Ihre

Od mája 2023 vediem agentúru PS:Digital z pozície Managing Directora, predtým som bol 5 rokov tímlídrom najväčšieho tímu zloženého z accountov a social media špecialistov.

Mimo toho sa bavím sociálnymi sieťami, a to či už Facebookom, Instagramom, Linkedinom a TikTokom. Robím analýzy komunikácie, školím, nastavujem social media stratégie.

felixrpopp.bio:
Ich bin Felix Popp, Gründer und Geschäftsführer von Popp Vision. Mit einem starken Fokus auf strategische Markeninszenierung im öffentlichen Raum bauen wir ein ein modernes Medienunternehmen im Bereich Out-of-Home (OOH) auf.

Gegründet im Jahr 2022, hat sich Popp Vision innerhalb kurzer Zeit als nationaler Anbieter im Bereich Out-of-Home (OOH) etabliert. Unser Fokus liegt auf drei Produktsegmenten:

Digital-Out-of-Home (DOOH): Über 100 digitale Screens, darunter großflächige LED-Walls an Hauptverkehrsadern und City Lights in Fußgängerzonen, bieten flexible und reichweitenstarke Werbemöglichkeiten.

I’m the Founder & CEO of Wemark, a marketing and technology powerhouse that brings together strategy, branding, communication, design, and tech to help brands grow. Before starting Wemark, I spent 15 years in marketing and sales, taking on roles like CMO & Board Member at Baku Electronics, Group Marketing Director at ATL Group, and Head of Retail at DNS Computers.

I’ve had the privilege of earning a dual MBA from HHL Leipzig Graduate School of Management and WSH Wroclaw Business University, which gave me a global perspective on marketing and consumer behavior. kosarzoltan.bio:
2005 -ben kezdtem el közterületi médiával foglalkozni, egy akkori piacvezető optimalizáló cégnél. És, mint akit egyszer a vonat füstje megcsapott az életem ezen a sinpáron haladt tovább.

Több reklámcégnél és médiatulajdonosnál dolgoztam a későbbiekben és szakmailag a kezdő tanulóból először senior médiavásárlóként, majd vásárlási igazgatóként kamatoztathattam a tudásomat. A nagy változás az életemben 2013 -ban kezdődött.

Ekkor egy online marketing cégnél dolgoztam miközben adódott a lehetőség, hogy ügyvezető és cégtulajdonos legyek, amivel elkezdhettem saját céget építeni. Az igazság az, hogy ennek a véletlennek a hiányában nem mertem volna belevágni.

Építve arra az ügyfélkörre, akik korábban is szerettek velem dolgozni bele vágtam. Az első pár hónap is nagyon eredm

🤝 Egy jó csapatban lenni – már gyerekként is érték. A focicsapatban, a zenekarban, a családban – ha hasznosnak érezzük magunkat, nő az…
👀 Mit lát egy gyerek, amikor óriásplakáton háborús képekkel találkozik? Egy kisgyerek még nem tudja értelmezni a világ nagy konfliktusait – csak…
"Aki a múltba tekint, az a jövőbe lát." A kampányok utólagos kielemezése elengedhetetlen ahhoz, hogy megértsük, mi működött, és mi nem a hirdetésben.…
A marketing világában néha érdemes egy lépéssel hátrébb lépni és átgondolni, mi is igazán fontos. Ebben a részben Kun Miklós, kommunikációs stratéga…
Nem mindegy, hogyan és miért jelennek meg nők egy kampányban. Tudatosan, hitelesen, az ügy mellé állva – vagy tárgyiasítva, üzenet nélkül,…

malin-myr_n-48174113.headline: VD XLoutdoor AB | Utomhusreklam på formidabla platser över hela Sverige 🤩
malin-myr_n-48174113.bio:
Mitt hjärta klappar extra hårt för de fantastiska möjligheter som vi har med utomhusreklam i Sverige.

Året var 2008 och jag hade arbetat som anställd med utomhusreklam i ett par år, då jag startade XLoutdoor AB. Bolaget jag arbetade för skulle läggas ner och jag tyckte det var alldeles för roligt för att sluta. Jag hade äntligen hittat arbetet där det kändes som -WOW det är det här jag vill göra när jag blir stor!
Så med hejarop från framförallt min älskade pappa, som också är företagare, tog jag klivet ut och satsade allt. Ett beslut som jag inte ångrar!

Jag såg vilka möjligheter som fanns att utveckla produkten och öka utbudet.
Vi har sedan starten 2008 gått från cirka 15 reklamplatser spridda över Stockholm, Göteborg och Malmö -till hundratals unika reklamplatser
